activities.title: Stakeholder Sort — Who Solves What?
instructions: Gallery walk or card sort: teacher, bank, government, insurer, planner, advisor
Squads debate where the trusted advisor fits
debriefQuestions: Where is the gap only a financial advisor can fill?

activities.title: Entrepreneur Lens Worksheet
instructions: Map market, problem, demand, impact, income for validated segment
Use Week 2 interview evidence — not assumptions
debriefQuestions: Which lens was hardest to prove with evidence?

activities.title: Platform Stack Exercise
instructions: Personalize: YOU → Professional Skills → AIA Platform → Clients → Income → Business → Leadership → Enterprise
Upload platform stack diagram to portfolio
debriefQuestions: What changes when AIA is a platform, not an employer?
